recommendations.overview: A contemporary, ensemble drama that tells the complex tale of six high school students whose lives are interwoven with situations that so many of today's youth are faced with. The story takes place during a normal school day. At precisely 2:37 a trag

recommendations.title: Anesthesia
recommendations.overview: Multiple lives intersect in the aftermath of the violent mugging of a Columbia University philosophy professor.

recommendations.title: Good Kids
recommendations.overview: Four high school students look to redefine themselves after graduation.

recommendations.title: Dude
recommendations.overview: Four best friends negotiate loss and major life changes during the last two weeks of high school.

recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: A few days before the baccalaureate, a high school student decides to settle accounts with the most cowardly teacher in the school.

recommendations.title: The Real Life of Teachers
recommendations.overview: A comedy about a band of voyeuristic students who take their jobs at the school paper to extremes, deciding to uncover the real lives of their teachers.

recommendations.title: Fame
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the lives of several teenagers who attend a New York high school for students gifted in the performing arts.

recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: Pierre Hoffman joins a prestigious school as a substitute teacher and soon notices, among some of his students, an unjustified hostility and a spark of violence in their eyes. Is it because the unspeakable tragedy they have just experienced? Is it be

recommendations.title: Not One Less
recommendations.overview: Set in the People's Republic of China during the 1990s, the film centers on a 13-year-old substitute teacher, Wei Minzhi, in the Chinese countryside. Called in to substitute for a village teacher for one month, Wei is told not to lose any students.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.
